name: What Needs Attention
description: Scan all agent inboxes, merge and dedupe pending items, send consolidated summary

steps.action: Scan all agent inboxes in shared/inbox/*/. Read all messages with status 'unread' or 'read' (not yet actioned). Group by priority (urgent → high → normal → low), deduplicate similar items, and compile a single 'Needs Attention' summary. Send to Anthony via Telegram with the top items requiring human input.
